data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster B fix approved: reviewer-base.md Step 1 + Step 3 remove redundant REPO_ROOT derivations, use 'cd "$REPO_ROOT"' pattern from dispatch. Build-review-agents.sh regen required to propagate to all 10 code-reviewer-*.md files.
